title: Praise God from Whom All Blessings Flow (Doxology)
author: Thomas Ken
story: Bishop Thomas Ken wrote this as the final stanza of both his morning and evening hymns for Winchester College students. It became the most frequently sung verse in Christian worship.

lines: Praise God, from Whom all blessings flow
Praise Him, all creatures here below
Praise Him above, ye heav'nly host
Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost
